regions.name: The Burning Wood
regions.description: An ancient forest lit from below by veins of buried starfire. The air smells of hot pine, and embers drift upward between the trunks like slow orange snow.

environmentalCodes.description: A warm underlight from the buried star — enough to see by, all wrong shadows.

nodes.name: The Forest Path
nodes.description: A root-tangled trail winding between smoldering trunks. The glow deepens toward a clearing ahead.

nodes.name: The Ember Clearing
nodes.description: A wide hollow where the buried starfire breaks the surface in glowing seams. The ruined shrine stands at its far edge.

nodes.name: The Ruined Shrine
nodes.description: A collapsed stone sanctuary half-swallowed by fire-blackened roots. The canopy above still burns, raining cinders on anyone below.

environmentalCodes.description: The burning canopy sheds cinders on anyone who lingers beneath it.
